message:
feat(core): add KPI aggregation layer for operational analytics (br-3vwi.7.1)

Implement the KPI (Key Performance Indicator) aggregation module that
computes core operational metrics with deterministic formulas for live
TUI dashboards:

- ThroughputKpi: message send/receive rates over configurable windows
- LatencyKpi: message delivery and acknowledgement latency percentiles
- AckPressureKpi: ratio of unacknowledged to total messages, measuring
  operator response pressure
- ContentionKpi: file reservation conflict frequency and severity

The module provides:
- KpiWindow: configurable time windows for metric aggregation
- KpiSnapshot: point-in-time metric captures with window bounds and
  sample counts
- KpiReport: composite report aggregating all KPI dimensions
- Thread-safe sample recording via atomic counters with lock-free reads
- Public API surface (kpi_report, kpi_snapshot, kpi_record_sample, etc.)
  re-exported from crate root for ergonomic access

This is the data layer backing the operational analytics track
(br-3vwi.7) which will feed anomaly detection, trend views, and
dashboard panels.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
